name: RaaS Core API
objective: Build MCU credit execution engine on Cloudflare Workers for metered AI agent execution
description: Create the core API layer that accepts AI agent tasks, validates API keys, deducts MCU credits, and returns execution results. Must support multi-tenant isolation with row-level security.
success_criteria: API accepts AI task submissions via POST /v1/execute
MCU credits deducted correctly based on task complexity
Multi-tenant isolation verified (no cross-tenant data access)
